headline: Everest Group (EG): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, Everest Group’s stock price fell to $322.37. Shareholders have lost 5.1% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 2.3%. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.
